Title: Azure Cloud Migration
Description: LiveAquaria.com Azure Cloud Migration Project Owner: CIS Intl Ltd, SBU of LiveAquaria.com, WC Role: Software Quality Assurance Engineer  As part of the LiveAquaria.com Azure Cloud Migration project, I contributed to ensuring the seamless transition of systems to Microsoft Azure by delivering high-quality testing across multiple platforms. This project provided an excellent opportunity to refine my expertise in cloud migration testing and quality assurance.  Key Responsibilities and Achievements: Mobile Cross-Browser and Cross-Platform Testing: Validated compatibility and functionality across diverse browsers and devices, ensuring a consistent user experience.  Payment Gateway Functionality Testing: Ensured secure and reliable payment processing systems, safeguarding customer transactions.  Automation Testing with Selenium: Designed and executed automated test cases to streamline testing processes, improving efficiency and accuracy.  Load Testing with JMeter: Assessed system performance under high traffic conditions to ensure scalability and reliability.  Successfully led the complete migration of LiveAquaria.com's eCommerce platform, including both the admin portal and customer-facing website, to Microsoft Azure. This project enhanced scalability, reliability, and efficiency while reducing operational costs.  I utilized advanced testing methodologies across Windows, macOS, and mobile platforms, ensuring cross-browser compatibility, robust security, and system resilience through stress testing. These efforts delivered an optimized shopping experience for customers and streamlined product management for the organization. Collaborating in a dynamic environment, I focused on quality assurance and operational excellence, driving impactful results that supported seamless migration and improved system performance.

Title: Cognitive search implementation
Description: LiveAquaria.com SLI Search Bar Migration to Azure Search Bar Project Owner: CIS Intl Ltd, SBU of LiveAquaria.com, WC Role: Software Quality Assurance Engineer  As part of the LiveAquaria.com SLI Search Bar Migration to Azure Search Bar project, I played a key role in ensuring the successful migration of the search functionality to Azure, focusing on delivering a seamless and high-performing user experience.  Key Responsibilities and Achievements: Mobile Cross-Browser and Cross-Platform Testing: Validated search functionality across diverse browsers and devices to ensure compatibility and responsiveness.  Payment Gateway Functionality Testing: Ensured secure and reliable payment processing integration with the new search system.  Automation Testing with Selenium: Developed and executed automated test cases to streamline testing processes and enhance efficiency.  Load Testing with JMeter: Evaluated system performance under high traffic conditions to ensure scalability and reliability.  API Testing with Postman: Conducted thorough API testing to verify seamless communication between components of the Azure-based search system.  Successfully migrated the SLI Search Bar to Azure Search for LiveAquaria.com's eCommerce platform, enhancing scalability, reliability, and search functionality. This project involved integrating Azure's advanced search capabilities, ensuring seamless product catalog indexing and optimized query processing for a superior customer experience.  I utilized my testing expertise to validate performance, security, and functionality across diverse platforms, including Windows, macOS, and mobile devices. Rigorous cross-browser compatibility testing and stress testing ensured consistent user experiences under high traffic loads. This migration not only improved search efficiency but also reduced operational costs and streamlined product management, reflecting my commitment to quality assurance and operational excellence.

Title: Unified Responsive Design for LiveAquaria.com
Description: Transition from Mobile-Specific Site (m.LiveAquaria.com) to Unified Responsive Design for LiveAquaria.com Product Owner: CIS International Ltd (SBU of LiveAquaria.com, WC) Role: Software Quality Assurance Engineer  I played a key role in migrating LiveAquaria.com’s mobile site (m.LiveAquaria.com) into a unified responsive design to address user challenges and streamline operations. The project eliminated separate versions, enhancing compatibility across devices like desktops, tablets, and smartphones. By simplifying maintenance and improving user experience, the responsive design ensured consistent functionality and aesthetics while optimizing performance and positioning the website for future growth.  Background and Challenges LiveAquaria.com transitioned from separate desktop and mobile sites to a responsive design, addressing user confusion and maintenance inefficiencies by ensuring a unified experience across devices.  My Role and Responsibilities As QA Engineer, I ensured the responsive design's quality by defining testing objectives, creating test plans, and conducting cross-platform and browser testing. I validated functionality, security, and responsiveness, performed stress testing for high traffic, tracked bugs, collaborated with developers for fixes, and ensured all standards were met before deployment.  Impact and Achievements The responsive design improved LiveAquaria.com’s operations by delivering a consistent user experience across devices, enhancing compatibility with various screen sizes, and optimizing performance. It reduced maintenance costs by consolidating updates into a single platform and positioned the website for future growth by accommodating emerging technologies. This project showcased my ability to collaborate effectively, ensuring quality results that drive business value and user satisfaction.

Title: FedEx address verification API integration to quick address pro service migration
Description: Instead of continuing quick address pro service, organization decided to continue with FedEx address verification API. FedEx was the primary shipping partner of the Liveaquaria.com e-commerce web application.   This project helps to minimize the unusual deductions of the shipping cost from customer or additional shipping cost to the organization my getting exact shipping address verification and cost in united states of America.

Title: Vendor aggregation API project

Tested manually, and set a timer to service scheduler to insert orders to ERP product database.  Database verification testing.  ERP testing and data verification.

Title: LLM Vulnerability & Prompt Injection Test Suite -Phase 01
Description: Architected and developed a comprehensive, data-driven automation suite using Playwright to validate the behavior, security, and UI integration of an enterprise AI agent platform.  Engineered automated workflows to simulate complex, multi-turn conversational JavaScript chat inputs and systematically capture AI responses for validation.  Designed a dynamic test data strategy to feed diverse conversational scenarios, ensuring all platform safety guardrails and business logic validations function as intended.  Spearheaded AI security testing initiatives, heavily prioritizing the identification and mitigation of prompt injection vulnerabilities.
